content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Working-tree diff only contained `.ralph-burning` state files, so I reviewed the latest implementation delta in `src/cli/run.rs`, `src/contexts/automation_runtime/cli_writer_lease.rs`, and `tests/cli.rs`. I did not find any correctness, safety, or robustness issues in this change set. Targeted tests passed, including the new signal-handoff repair and orphaned-backend SIGKILL cases plus the existing authoritative-leader safety regression test.

## Amendments

None.
